title: viola × neumanniana
intro: Viola × neumanniana, also known as Neumann's pansy or hybrid pansy, is a hybrid plant species within the Viola genus, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and delicate purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Viola × neumanniana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Viola × neumanniana is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
